data.name: StartPatchingConfirmation
data.value: This will start patching the necessary game files. Do you want to do this?

data.name: InvalidGameFolderDialogTlkNotFound
data.value: Invalid game folder specified, dialog.tlk file not found! Make sure you have selected the correct game directory.

data.name: NoValidGameFolderSelected
data.value: Error! No valid game folder selected! Installation aborted.

data.name: SkippingFileNoOverwriteDialogTlk
data.value: Skipping file {0}, this Installer will not overwrite dialog.tlk directly.

data.name: NwnnsscompNotFoundInTslPatchData
data.value: Could not locate nwnnsscomp.exe in the TSLPatchData folder! Unable to compile script.

data.name: Invalid2DAMemoryToken
data.value: Invalid 2DAMEMORY token found! Token indexes must be non-negative (0, 1, 2, ...).

data.name: PatcherFinished
data.value: The Patcher is finished. Please check the progress log for details about what was installed.

data.name: PatcherFinishedWithWarnings
data.value: The Patcher is finished, but {0} warnings were encountered! The Mod may or may not work correctly.

data.name: PatcherFinishedWithErrors
data.value: The Patcher is finished, but {0} errors were encountered! The Mod has likely not been installed correctly.

data.name: PatcherFinishedWithErrorsAndWarnings
data.value: The Patcher is finished, but {0} errors and {1} warnings were encountered! The Mod has likely not been installed correctly.

data.name: StrRefTokenNotInTLK
data.value: StrRef token "{0}" in modifier list that was not present in the TLK.

data.name: NoNewEntriesAppendedToTlk
data.value: Warning: No new entries appended to {0}. Possible missing entries in append.tlk.

data.name: NoTLKFileLoaded
data.value: No TLK file loaded. Unable to proceed.

data.name: UnableToLocateTLKFileToPatch
data.value: Error! Unable to locate TLK file to patch, "{0}" file not found!

data.name: UnableToFind2DAFileToModify
data.value: Unable to find 2DA file "{0}" to modify! Skipping file...

data.name: ErrorLookingUpRowLabelForRowIndex
data.value: Error looking up row label for row index {0}.

data.name: ErrorLookingUpColumnLabelForColumnIndex
data.value: Error looking up column label for column index {0}.

data.name: UsedAsIndexBut2DAHasNoLabel
data.value: {0} used as index when changing line in modifier "{1}" but 2DA file has no label for that index.

data.name: FailedToCopyLine2DA
data.value: Error! Failed to copy line in 2DA! Skipping...

data.name: UnableToLoad2DAFileSkipping
data.value: Unable to load the 2DA file {0}! Skipping it...

data.name: NoValueAssignedColumn2DA
data.value: No value has been assigned to column {0} for new 2DA line in modifier "{1}"...

data.name: ErrorAddingNewLine2DA
data.value: An error occured while trying to add new line to 2DA in modifier "{0}"!

data.name: InternalErrorInvalidTLKFileType
data.value: Internal error, invalid TLK file type specified.

data.name: CriticalErrorUnableToLocateFileToPatch
data.value: Critical error: Unable to locate file to patch, "{0}" file not found!

data.name: NoFileToInstallSpecified
data.value: Error! No file to install is specified!

data.name: NoInstallPathSet
data.value: Error! No install path has been set!

data.name: FileSetToPatchDoesNotExist
data.value: Error! File "{0}" set to be patched does not exist!

data.name: UnableToLoadInstructionsTslpatchdata
data.value: Unable to load the instructions text! Make sure the "tslpatchdata" folder contains the "info.rtf" file!

data.name: SectionNotFoundError
data.value: The [{0}] section was not found in the ini

data.name: IniTextCannotBeNullOrEmpty
data.value: INI text cannot be null or empty

data.name: NoLineSetToBeModifiedFormat
data.value: No line set to be modified in [{0}].

data.name: OrphanedIniSectionsFormat
data.value: There are some orphaned ini sections found in the changes: {0}

data.name: CouldNotFindChangesIniFile
data.value: Could not find the changes ini file on disk.

data.name: CouldNotCreateInstallLogFile
data.value: Could not create install log file: {0}

data.name: CouldNotDetermineEncoding
data.value: Could not determine encoding of '{0}'. Attempting to force load...

data.name: InvalidKotorDirectory
data.value: Chosen KOTOR directory is not a valid installation - cannot initialize ModInstaller.

data.name: FileHasNoContent
data.value: '{0}' has no content/data and is completely empty.

data.name: SkippingFilePatchResource
data.value: Skipping '{0}' - patch_resource determined that this file can be skipped.

data.name: CleaningTemporaryScriptFolder
data.value: Cleaning temporary script folder at '{0}' (hint: use 'SaveProcessedScripts=1' in [Settings] to keep these scripts)

data.name: PatchingRimFileWarning
data.value: This mod is patching RIM file Modules/{0}! Patching RIMs is highly incompatible, not recommended, and widely considered bad practice. Please request the mod developer to fix this.

data.name: ModuleDidNotExistBuilding
data.value: IMPORTANT! The module at path '{0}' did not exist, building one in the 'Modules' folder immediately from the following files:

data.name: CapsuleNotFoundOrPermission
data.value: The capsule '{0}' did not exist, or permission issues occurred, when attempting to {1} '{2}'. Skipping file...

data.name: CouldNotLoadSourceFileMissing
data.value: Could not load source file to {0}: SourceFile is missing or empty (fix or remove this InstallList / patch row in changes.ini).

data.name: CouldNotLoadFileSaveAsMissing
data.value: Could not load file to {0}: SaveAs is missing or empty.

data.name: CouldNotLoadResourceFromCapsule
data.value: Could not load resource from capsule to {0}: SaveAs is missing or empty.

data.name: CouldNotLoadSourceFileFormat
data.value: Could not load source file to {0}:{1}{2}

data.name: CapsuleNotFoundWhenAttempting
data.value: The capsule '{0}' did not exist when attempting to {1} '{2}'. Skipping file...

data.name: RenamedExistingOverrideFile
data.value: Renamed existing Override file '{0}' to '{1}' to prevent shadowing.

data.name: CouldNotRenameInOverrideFolder
data.value: Could not rename '{0}' to '{1}' in the Override folder: {2}

data.name: ResourceShadowingModChanges
data.value: A resource located at '{0}' is shadowing this mod's changes in {1}!

data.name: ModOvershadowedByExisting
data.value: This mod intends to install '{0}' into '{1}', but is overshadowed by the existing '{2}'!

data.name: ConfigReaderFinishedLoadingIni
data.value: The ConfigReader finished loading the INI

data.name: SkippingEmptyInstallListEntry
data.value: Skipping empty InstallList entry (blank line or empty key in changes.ini [InstallList] section).

data.name: CliErrorCannotRunMultipleOperations
data.value: [Error] Cannot run more than one of [--install, --uninstall, --validate]

data.name: CliErrorMustSpecifyOperation
data.value: [Error] Must specify one of [--install, --uninstall, --validate] for CLI mode

data.name: PathPointsToExpectedGffList
data.value: Path points to a '{0}', expected a GFFList.

data.name: UnableToAddStructToList
data.value: Unable to add struct to list '{0}': {1}

data.name: FailedToAddNewStructToList
data.value: Failed to add a new struct to list '{0}' in [{1}]. Reason: Expected GFFStruct but got '{2}' ({3}) of type {4} Skipping...

data.name: ApplyPatchFromIniSection
data.value: Apply patch from INI section [{0}] FieldType: {1} GFF Path: '{2}'

data.name: UnableToAddNewGffField
data.value: Unable to add new GFF Field '{0}' at GFF Path '{1}'! This {2}

data.name: InstructionJumpsToNotInList
data.value: Instruction #{0} ({1}) jumps to instruction not in list. Jump target hash: {2}

data.name: InfiniteLoopDetectedExecuted
data.value: Infinite loop detected: instruction at index {0} ({1}) has been executed {2} times

data.name: JumpInstructionNoTarget
data.value: Jump instruction {0} at index {1} has no jump target

data.name: JumpTargetNotFound
data.value: Jump target for instruction {0} not found in instruction table

data.name: InfiniteLoopJumpsToItself
data.value: Infinite loop detected: {0} at index {1} jumps to itself

data.name: CannotAdvanceSameInstruction
data.value: Cannot advance: next instruction at index {0} is the same as current at index {1}

data.name: InstructionNotPresentInTable
data.value: Instruction not present in current instruction table

data.name: StoreStateCannotAccessInstruction
data.value: STORE_STATE at index {0}: cannot access instruction at index {1}

data.name: StoreStateReachedEndWithoutRetn
data.value: STORE_STATE at index {0}: reached end of instructions without finding RETN

data.name: ActionInstructionRequiresTwoArgs
data.value: ACTION instruction requires at least 2 arguments

data.name: ActionIdOutOfRange
data.value: Action ID {0} is out of range (0-{1})

data.name: StackUnderflowPoppingVector
data.value: Stack underflow while popping vector for '{0}'

data.name: StackUnderflowPoppingArgument
data.value: Stack underflow while popping argument for '{0}'

data.name: FileHasNoEntryPoint
data.value: This file has no entry point and cannot be compiled (Most likely an include file).
